## Sample context

> The wild hunt.** A Northern ranger's tale almost always includes an ageless huntsman in the winter woods who issues a challenge or a boon before vanishing like morning frost — likely the **Huntsman of the Wild Hunt**…
> The Huntsman of the Wild Hunt.** A presence more than a person; the embodiment of the Hunt itself.
